items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific behavior. The linked use case and prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the impact of group size changes on bookings, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence or outcomes related to this scenario, it is impossible to determine if the expected result is met.
